blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,500 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
